headline: Is Pool (POOL) Ready For A Rebound After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether Pool at around US$232.55 is priced for a comeback or still has room to fall, the answer lies in how its current share price compares with its underlying value. The stock has moved 2.2% over the last 7 days and 15.0% over the last 30 days, yet year to date it is up only 1.2% and the 1 year return stands at an 18.7% decline, with 3 year and 5 year returns at 30.8% and 41.4% declines respectively. Recent price action has been shaped by ongoing investor reassessment...
